stemHtml: An applicant for a commercial pilot licence aeroplane shall have completed in aeroplanes not less than…

options.a: 20 hours of cross country flight time as pilot-in-command including a cross country flight not less than 540 km (300NM)
options.b: 15 hours of cross country flight time as pilot-in-command including a cross country flight not less than 540 km (300NM)
options.c: 25 hours of cross country flight time as pilot-in-command including a cross country flight not less than 540 km (300NM)
options.d: 10 hours of cross country flight time as pilot-in-command including a cross country flight not less than 540 km (300NM)
